creator: pgollucci@p6m7g8.com
text:
On 4/20/2011 6:52 PM, Olli Hauer wrote:
 > The changes are documented on http://wiki.freebsd.org/bsd.apache.mk
 <quote>
 In case a port use apache13 and for example PHP MANUAL_PACKAGE_BUILDING
 should be defined as soon as apache22 is the default to prevent build
 issues on pointyhat.
 </quote>
 
 Either I'm reading this wrong or one of the 2 of us is confused. I don't
 know that I've ever actually run php with apache13.  Only ever 20/22.
 PHP sure does build with 2+, and in fact the default freebsd packages
 should switch to that when we pull the trigger.  If this isn't the case,
 then we need to change something 1st.
 
 At any rate, ohauer, this is like --- freaking awesome.  Most excellent
 work and documentation.
 
 
 -
 ------------------------------------------------------------------------
 1024D/DB9B8C1C B90B FBC3 A3A1 C71A 8E70  3F8C 75B8 8FFB DB9B 8C1C

 love like you'll never get hurt,
 and dance like nobody's watching.
